raw: {"perspective": "Legal Advisor", "findings": [{"severity": "WARN", "file_or_area": "GDPR Article 22", "issue": "Automated decision consent flow exists but may not be legally sufficient for all user scenarios", "recommended_fix": "Review and refine consent flow to ensure explicit user consent for automated decisions"}, {"severity": "OK", "file_or_area": "AZ Personal Data Protection Act", "issue": "Compliant for Baku launch", "recommended_fix": "None"}, {"severity": "BLOCK", "file_or_area": "Platform liability", "issue": "Using AURA score for hiring decisions may expose the platform to significant legal risks", "recommended_fix": "Consult with legal counsel to assess and mitigate potential liabilities"}, {"severity": "WARN", "file_or_area": "Data processor agreements", "issue": "DPAs with Supabase, Google Cloud, and Railway may not be fully executed or up-to-date", "recommended_fix": "Verify and update DPAs to ensure compliance with relevant regulations"}, {"severity": "OK", "file_or_area": "Terms of Service", "issue": "Current ToS covers AI-generated assessments", "recommended_fix": "None"}], "overall_verdict": "WARN", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: Automated decision consent flow exists but may not be legally sufficient for all user scenarios
findings.recommended_fix: Review and refine consent flow to ensure explicit user consent for automated decisions

findings.issue: Using AURA score for hiring decisions may expose the platform to significant legal risks
findings.recommended_fix: Consult with legal counsel to assess and mitigate potential liabilities

findings.issue: DPAs with Supabase, Google Cloud, and Railway may not be fully executed or up-to-date
findings.recommended_fix: Verify and update DPAs to ensure compliance with relevant regulations
